name: Onyx Actions
description: 13 paid agent tools over x402 USDC on Base mainnet — captcha OCR, real-SIM SMS OTP, HLR, URL text, DNS, WHOIS, email validation, IP geo, FX, and more. Bundle endpoint for one-call signup pre-flight. Built on the open-source `onyx-paid-mcp` Python framework that lets anyone ship a paid MCP in 5 lines.
